_comment: TakeTakeTake training flow — edit freely to personalise your thinking process.

sections.title: 1 — Safety
questions: Is my king safe? Any immediate mating threats?

sections.title: 2 — Read the imbalances
questions: Material balance: who is ahead and by how much?

sections.title: 3 — Three questions
questions: What are the weaknesses in the position (mine and my opponent's)?
What is my worst placed piece, and how can I improve it?
What is my opponent's plan? What are they trying to achieve in the next few moves?

sections.title: 4 — Create a plan
questions: Does my opponent have a plan I must prevent or prepare a counter to?

sections.title: 5 — Calculate candidates
questions: Play the move with the best evaluation.
